title: 3 Tech Stocks To Watch In June 2022
text: Could tech stocks be worth your attention this week?

title: Marvell Introduces Industry's First Automotive Ethernet Switch with Lockstep Dual-Core Reliability for Safer Vehicles
text: Third Generation Brightlane™ Switch Advances Software-Defined Vehicles with Comprehensive Data Security and Safety Features SANTA CLARA, Calif. and MUNICH, May 31, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell (NASDAQ: MRVL) today introduced its third generation Marvell® Brightlane™ Ethernet Switch, the industry's most advanced automotive secure managed switch, and the first with lockstep dual-core Arm processing redundancy to enable high-reliability for mission-critical applications that support vehicle safety and performance.

title: 7 Battered Growth Stocks to Avoid Even at a Discount
text: Sluggish operational performance and deteriorating bottom line are adverse catalysts for these battered stocks. BYND, FSR, and AMC stock should be avoided in the next few months.

title: Marvell (MRVL) Gains on Q1 Earnings Beat, Strong Guidance
text: Marvell's (MRVL) Q1 performance reflects the solid demand for its chip in the data center end market and contributions from all other end markets.

title: Marvell Technology, Inc. (MRVL) CEO Matt Murphy on Q1 2023 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MRVL ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call May 26, 2022 4:45 PM ET Company Participants Ashish Saran - SVP, IR Matt Murphy - CEO Jean Hu - CFO Conference Call Participants Toshiya Hari - Goldman Sachs Chris Caso - Raymond James Gary Mobley - Wells Fargo Timothy Arcuri - UBS Vivek Arya - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Matt Ramsay - Cowen Ross Seymore - Deutsche Bank Tore Svanberg - Stifel Harlan Sur - JPMorgan CJ Muse - Evercore ISI Operator Good afternoon, and welcome to Marvell Technology's Fiscal First Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call. At this time, all participants will be in listen-only mode.

title: Marvell Technology (MRVL) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Marvell (MRVL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 1.96% and 1.41%, respectively, for the quarter ended April 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Marvell Reports Solid Earnings. Stock Jumps.
text: The semiconductor firm reported slightly better-than-expected earnings and revenue. The outlook beat analyst estimates, as well.

title: After Hours Action: Why Marvell Technology Stock Is Moving
text: Marvell Technology Inc (NASDAQ: MRVL) shares are trading higher in Thursday's after-hours session after the company reported financial results.  Marvell said fiscal first-quarter revenue increased 74% year-over-year to $1.45 billion, which beat the estimate of $1.43 billion,.

title: Marvell Technology, Inc. Reports First Quarter of Fiscal Year 2023 Financial Results
text: Q1 Net Revenue: $1.447 billion, grew by 74% year-on-year Q1 Gross Margin: 51.9% GAAP gross margin; 65.5% non-GAAP gross margin Q1 Diluted income (loss) per share: $(0.20) GAAP diluted loss per share; $0.52 non-GAAP diluted income per share SANTA CLARA, Calif. , May 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ: MRVL), a leader in infrastructure semiconductor solutions, today reported financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2023.

title: Earnings Previews: Dell, Marvell, Pinduoduo, VMware, Workday
text: The three major U.S. equity indexes closed mixed on Tuesday. The Dow Jones industrial blue-chippers added about 0.2%, while the S&P 500 closed down 0.8% and the Nasdaq retreated nearly 2.4%.

title: What's in the Offing for Marvell (MRVL) This Earnings Season?
text: Marvell's (MRVL) Q1 performance is likely to have gained from the solid demand for its networking and storage products. Also, the acquisition of Inphi might have contributed to the quarterly performance.

title: Marvell Achieves Industry-Leading 100,000 400G Coherent DSP Shipment Milestone
text: Cignal AI Forecasts 150,000 400Gbps Pluggable Modules to be Shipped by Mid-year 2022 SANTA CLARA, Calif. , May 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell (NASDAQ: MRVL) today announced that it has shipped more than 100,000 400G Coherent Digital Signal Processors (CDSPs), enabling open and standards-based pluggable solutions for cloud and carrier networks worldwide.

title: 4 Top Semiconductor Stocks To Watch In The Stock Market Today
text: Could these semiconductor stocks be worth looking at now?

title: Best Stocks To Buy Now? 4 Semiconductor Stocks For Your List
text: Which semiconductor stocks are investors' watching right now?

title: Marvell: Well Positioned For Long-Term Performance
text: Marvell is a semiconductor company with application-specific expertise in some of the fastest-growing industries. Marvell stands to benefit from the global multi-year strategic shift towards automotive, cloud/data centers, and 5G – also implying exposure to the metaverse story.

title: Broadcom Vs. Marvell: Better Chipmaker Company To Buy
text: We compared Broadcom and Marvell's semiconductor business across logic and analog semiconductors and determined that Marvell edges out Broadcom with a superior ASICs and processor technology. Further, we compared their analog business and determined that Broadcom has a superior analog business in fiber channels, optics, and other analog products.

title: Marvell (MRVL) Enhances CXL Portfolio With Tanzanite Buyout
text: The buyout of Tanzanite Silicon Solutions is likely to broaden Marvell Technology's (MRVL) silicon solutions portfolio and, in turn, enhance the company's cloud data center business.

title: Why Marvell (MRVL) Is Buying Tanzanite
text: Marvell (NASDAQ: MRVL) announced a definitive agreement to buy privately-held Tanzanite Silicon Solutions. These are the details.

title: Marvell Bolsters Cloud-Optimized CXL Portfolio with Acquisition of Tanzanite
text: Integrates into Marvell's Unique, End-to-End CXL Platform for Cloud Data Centers SANTA CLARA, Calif. , May 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell (NASDAQ: MRVL) today announced a definitive agreement to acquire privately-held Tanzanite Silicon Solutions, Inc., a leading developer of advanced Compute Express Link™ (CXL™) technologies, in an all-cash transaction.

title: Marvell Ranked #3 in 2022 Bay Area Best Places to Work
text: SANTA CLARA, Calif. , May 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Marvell (NASDAQ: MRVL) is pleased to announce it has placed #3 overall and also in Workplace Wellness in the Best Places to Work 2022 largest company category at the annual awards program produced by the San Francisco Business Times and Silicon Valley Business Journal.
